entries.label: Settled Solids (Evaluate after allowing sample to settle one hour)
Suspended Solids (Evaluate after allowing sample to settle for one hour)
Was a sample collected at this Outfall in previous quarter?
Was a sample collected within 30 minutes of the beginning of the storm event?
If EITHER answer is no, explain why not
Was storm event at least 72 hours after the previous storm event?
Did evaluation of stormwater show poor quality indicators?

If yes, describe the potential source(s), identify corrective actions, personnel responsible for corrective actions, and time schedule for completion of corrective actions.  Document any follow-up actions and date corrective actions completed.
